note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.dfn.inter module functions.

methods.name: end1
methods.description: Get the end1 fracture object.

methods.name: end2
methods.description: Get the end2 fracture object.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the intersection extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the intersection group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: inter.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the intersection. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this intersection is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the intersection id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: inter.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the intersection is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Get the intersection length.

methods.name: polylinept
methods.description: Get the polyline intersection point at the specified index (vector).

methods.name: polylinept_count
methods.description: Get the intersection number of polyline points.

methods.name: pos1
methods.description: Get the intersection first end position (vector).

methods.name: pos1_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the intersection first end position.

methods.name: pos1_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the intersection first end position.

methods.name: pos1_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the intersection first end position.

methods.name: pos2
methods.description: Get the intersection second end position (vector).

methods.name: pos2_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the intersection second end position.

methods.name: pos2_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the intersection second end position.

methods.name: pos2_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the intersection second end position.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Get the intersection set to which this intersection belongs.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the intersection extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: inter.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the intersection group name in a given slot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this intersection is live.
